rulings.Case Title: CHIKODI CHIMA VS. KRISTIN F. WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 10, 2020 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT CHIKODI CHIMA DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Cross-Complainant filed a First Amended Cross-Complaint on February 26, 2020. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TEL-ONE NETWORK SERVICES, INC., VS. DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, L.L.C ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Injunctive And Monetary Relief And For An Award Of Its Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Cost
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 10, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF TEL-ONE NETWORK SERVICES, INC., Notice Of Motion And Motion For Injunctive And Monetary Relief And For An Award Of Its Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Cost is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to meet the standards of a Preliminary Injunction as set forth by the opposing party. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN F. LEE VS. DANIEL EVERETT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 10, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT DANIEL EVERETT Motion To Vacate is CONTINUED to March 20, 2020. Defendant must comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) by submitting courtesy copies to the Court by March 13, 2020 with an updated cover page reflecting the new hearing date. =(501/REQ)
